auth.forgotPasswordHint: Enter your email and we'll send reset instructions.
auth.accessDeniedBody: This dashboard is for vendor applicants and approved service providers only.
auth.mainHandoffHint: You were redirected from MyTicket. Sign in with the same account to continue your vendor application or dashboard.

application.status_provisioning: Your profile is being set up…
application.categoriesNote: Select the services you offer. At least one category is required.
application.document_required: At least one verification document is required.
application.gallery_required: Add photos of your past work or equipment.
application.incomplete: Please complete all required fields before submitting.
application.categoriesRequired: Select at least one service category to continue.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.readOnlyImage: Contact support to update your profile image.

availability.title: Availability
availability.availableHint: Organizers can discover and contact you in the marketplace.
availability.reservedHint: You appear as booked. Switch back when you're open to new requests.
availability.engagementHint: Accepting an engagement automatically sets your status to reserved. Completing or cancelling returns you to available.

ratings.title: Ratings
ratings.empty: Complete engagements to receive ratings from organizers.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage language, notifications, and account preferences.
settings.notificationsHint: Notification preferences are managed on the main MyTicket website.
settings.accountHint: Email and phone changes require re-verification on the main website.

errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
